steps.title: Apply the triangle area formula
steps.content:
Substitute base = 56 cm and height = 112 cm into the triangle area formula:
$$A = \frac{1}{2} \times 56 \times 112$$

steps.title: Simplify and compute
steps.content:
Observe that $\frac{112}{2} = 56$:
$$A = 56 \times 56 = 3,136$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
